name: naval
description: Unofficial 79-skill Naval pack with setup, memory, reviews, and scorecards.

interface.longDescription: Unofficial Naval Skills provides 79 n-prefixed skills that help agents apply ideas from The Almanack of Naval Ravikant. The skills cover wealth, judgment, happiness, health, values, reading, decisions, scorecards, daily reviews, weekly reviews, optional memory setup, saved learnings, memory refresh, source fidelity, and quote safety. The pack includes shared references, a router, examples, install docs, direct-copy validation, and coverage checks. It does not include the full book text.
defaultPrompt: Use n-router to choose the right Naval skill.
Use n-setup to configure optional Naval memory.
